bash -c 
  export HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0
  export PATH='/b/develop/moat/projects/GOMC/build_gfx1201:'$PATH
  
  # Test 1: GPU_GEMC on AR_KR SingleRun (3000 steps, VDW only)
  echo '=== Test 1: GPU_GEMC AR_KR SingleRun (3000 steps) ==='
  cd /b/develop/moat/projects/GOMC/src/test/input/Systems/AR_KR/SingleRun
  /b/develop/moat/projects/GOMC/build_gfx1201/GOMC_GPU_GEMC.exe in.conf 2>&1
  echo 'Test1_exit: '$?

bash -c 
  export HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0
  BUILD=/b/develop/moat/projects/GOMC/build_gfx1201
  SRC=/b/develop/moat/projects/GOMC/src
  
  PASS=0
  FAIL=0
  
  run_test() {
    local name=$1
    local exe=$2
    local dir=$3
    local conf=$4
    echo ''
    echo '=== '$name' ==='
    output=$($BUILD/$exe $dir/$conf 2>&1)
    if echo "$output" | grep -q 'Completed at'; then
      echo 'PASS: '$name
      echo "$output" | grep -E 'Simulation Time|% Accepted|steps' | tail -5
      PASS=$((PASS+1))
    else
      echo 'FAIL: '$name
      echo "$output" | tail -20
      FAIL=$((FAIL+1))
    fi
  }
  
  # Test 1: GPU_GEMC on AR_KR SingleRun (3000 steps, VDW)
  run_test 'GPU_GEMC AR_KR SingleRun' 'GOMC_GPU_GEMC.exe' $SRC/test/input/Systems/AR_KR/SingleRun 'in.conf'
  
  # Test 2: GPU_GEMC on ISOPEN_NEOPEN (complex molecules)
  run_test 'GPU_GEMC ISOPEN_NEOPEN' 'GOMC_GPU_GEMC.exe' $SRC/test/input/Systems/ISOPEN_NEOPEN/SingleRun 'in.conf'
  
  # Test 3: GPU_GCMC on PEN_HEX (Ewald electrostatics, 200 steps)
  run_test 'GPU_GCMC PEN_HEX' 'GOMC_GPU_GCMC.exe' $SRC/test/input/Systems/PEN_HEX/SingleRun 'in.conf'
  
  # Test 4: GPU_NVT on AR_KR K_1 (1000 steps, NVT GEMC but using NVT binary)
  run_test 'GPU_GEMC AR_KR K_1' 'GOMC_GPU_GEMC.exe' $SRC/test/input/Systems/AR_KR/K_1 'in.conf'
  
  # Test 5: GPU_GEMC AR_KR K_N (1000 steps, multiple molecule kinds)
  run_test 'GPU_GEMC AR_KR K_N' 'GOMC_GPU_GEMC.exe' $SRC/test/input/Systems/AR_KR/K_N 'in.conf'
  
  echo ''
  echo 'Summary: PASS='$PASS' FAIL='$FAIL

bash -c 
  export HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0
  BUILD=/b/develop/moat/projects/GOMC/build_gfx1201
  SRC=/b/develop/moat/projects/GOMC/src
  
  PASS=0
  FAIL=0
  
  run_test() {
    local name=$1
    local exe=$2
    local dir=$3
    local conf=$4
    echo ''
    echo '=== '$name' ==='
    output=$(cd $dir && $BUILD/$exe $conf 2>&1)
    if echo "$output" | grep -q 'Completed at'; then
      echo 'PASS: '$name
      echo "$output" | grep -E 'Simulation Time|% Accepted|steps' | tail -5
      PASS=$((PASS+1))
    else
      echo 'FAIL: '$name
      echo "$output" | grep -E 'Error|error|failed|Failed' | head -5
      echo "$output" | tail -5
      FAIL=$((FAIL+1))
    fi
  }
  
  # Test 1: GPU_GEMC on AR_KR SingleRun (3000 steps, VDW)
  run_test 'GPU_GEMC AR_KR SingleRun' 'GOMC_GPU_GEMC.exe' $SRC/test/input/Systems/AR_KR/SingleRun 'in.conf'
  
  # Test 2: GPU_GEMC on ISOPEN_NEOPEN (complex molecules, 3000 steps)
  run_test 'GPU_GEMC ISOPEN_NEOPEN' 'GOMC_GPU_GEMC.exe' $SRC/test/input/Systems/ISOPEN_NEOPEN/SingleRun 'in.conf'
  
  # Test 3: GPU_GCMC on PEN_HEX (Ewald electrostatics, 200 steps)
  run_test 'GPU_GCMC PEN_HEX' 'GOMC_GPU_GCMC.exe' $SRC/test/input/Systems/PEN_HEX/SingleRun 'in.conf'
  
  # Test 4: GPU_GEMC AR_KR K_1 (restart test, 1000 steps)
  run_test 'GPU_GEMC AR_KR K_1' 'GOMC_GPU_GEMC.exe' $SRC/test/input/Systems/AR_KR/K_1 'in.conf'
  
  # Test 5: GPU_GEMC AR_KR K_N (N molecule kinds, 1000 steps)
  run_test 'GPU_GEMC AR_KR K_N' 'GOMC_GPU_GEMC.exe' $SRC/test/input/Systems/AR_KR/K_N 'in.conf'
  
  echo ''
  echo 'Summary: PASS='$PASS' FAIL='$FAIL

bash -c 
  export HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0
  BUILD=/b/develop/moat/projects/GOMC/build_gfx1201
  SRC=/b/develop/moat/projects/GOMC/src
  
  PASS=0
  FAIL=0
  
  run_test() {
    local name=$1
    local exe=$2
    local dir=$3
    local conf=$4
    echo ''
    echo '=== '$name' ==='
    start=$(date +%s)
    output=$(cd $dir && timeout 120 $BUILD/$exe $conf 2>&1)
    rc=$?
    end=$(date +%s)
    elapsed=$((end-start))
    if echo "$output" | grep -q 'Completed at' && [ $rc -eq 0 ]; then
      echo 'PASS: '$name' ('${elapsed}'s)'
      echo "$output" | grep -E '% Accepted' | head -3
      PASS=$((PASS+1))
    else
      echo 'FAIL: '$name' (rc='$rc', '${elapsed}'s)'
      echo "$output" | grep -E 'Error|error' | head -3
      echo "$output" | tail -3
      FAIL=$((FAIL+1))
    fi
  }
  
  # Core GPU tests:
  # 1. GPU_GEMC on AR_KR (VDW, 3000 steps)
  run_test 'GPU_GEMC AR_KR' 'GOMC_GPU_GEMC.exe' $SRC/test/input/Systems/AR_KR/SingleRun 'in.conf'
  
  # 2. GPU_GEMC on ISOPEN_NEOPEN (complex MEMC moves, 3000 steps)
  run_test 'GPU_GEMC ISOPEN_NEOPEN' 'GOMC_GPU_GEMC.exe' $SRC/test/input/Systems/ISOPEN_NEOPEN/SingleRun 'in.conf'
  
  # 3. GPU_GCMC on PEN_HEX (Ewald electrostatics, 200 steps)
  run_test 'GPU_GCMC PEN_HEX Ewald' 'GOMC_GPU_GCMC.exe' $SRC/test/input/Systems/PEN_HEX/SingleRun 'in.conf'
  
  # 4. GPU_GCMC on BPTI_TIP3 (protein system, Ewald, 2000 steps)
  run_test 'GPU_GCMC BPTI_TIP3' 'GOMC_GPU_GCMC.exe' $SRC/test/input/Systems/BPTI_TIP3/SingleRun 'in.conf'
  
  # 5. GPU_GCMC on K_CHANNEL_TIP3 (K channel, 2000 steps)
  run_test 'GPU_GCMC K_CHANNEL_TIP3' 'GOMC_GPU_GCMC.exe' $SRC/test/input/Systems/K_CHANNEL_TIP3/SingleRun 'in.conf'
  
  echo ''
  echo 'Summary: PASS='$PASS' FAIL='$FAIL
